description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image and a pip cache at .cache/pip plus the virtualenv directory env/. Define a variable PIP_CACHE_DIR pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache. Add a before_script that runs python -V, installs virtualenv via pip, creates a virtualenv in env, and activates it. In the default test stage add a job named run that executes pip install . as its script. No services, artifacts, or rules are required.
